'''Pira Bland''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chandrilan/Legends|Chandrilan]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] runner who visited [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] frequently when he was on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the start of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Passages" />
